content:
Character: Dominic Voss
Perception: The guy on five — stocky, solid, carries himself like someone who's been in charge of things. We sit on the rooftop sometimes and he brings Scotch I'd never buy. Doesn't push conversation, doesn't ask questions I don't want to answer. That's rare. He looks like money but doesn't act like it — no flash, no condescension. I think he's ex-something — military, maybe construction — before whatever made him rich. He sees me as the quiet neighbor. I see him as reliable. I know he collects cars and lives alone. I know he paces his apartment at night, same as me.
summary:
Character: Dominic Voss
Perception: The guy on five — stocky, solid, carries himself like someone who's been in charge of things. We sit on the rooftop sometimes and he brings Scotch I'd never buy. Doesn't push conversation, doesn't ask questions I don't want to answer. That's rare. He looks like money but doesn't act like it — no flash, no condescension. I think he's ex-something — military, maybe construction — before whatever made him rich. He sees me as the quiet neighbor. I see him as reliable. I know he collects cars and lives alone. I know he paces his apartment at night, same as me.
